item.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 has topped 8 million sales worldwide
item.content:encoded:
Chris Kerr,

Senior Editor, News,GameDeveloper.com

April 24, 2026

1 Min Read

Image via Sandfall Interactive

Newsbrief: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 has sold more than 8 million copies worldwide. 

The milestone was shared by developer Sandfall Interactive to celebrate the first anniversary of the award-winning RPG. The studio also noted that Expedition 33 was the most downloaded new third-party release on Xbox Game Pass in 2025. 

"Since launch, we’ve been blown away by the way fans have reacted to our game,” said Guillaume Broche, creative director at Sandfall. "Every day has felt like a dream for us, and we owe to all our players a lifetime of thank you. You made this year unforgettable."

About the Author

Senior Editor, News, GameDeveloper.com

Game Developer news editor Chris Kerr is an award-winning reporter with over a decade of experience in the game industry. His byline has appeared in notable print and digital publications including Edge, Stuff, Wireframe, International Business Times, and PocketGamer.biz. Throughout his career, Chris has covered major industry events including GDC, PAX Australia, Gamescom, Paris Games Week, and Develop Brighton.
